---
description-meta: |
  This note is for a tutorial on AI for Mathematical Biology.
---

## Welcome {.unnumbered}

This note is a Julia tutorial on AI for Mathematical Biology. It is designed as the coding component of a 3-hour course, moving from basic Julia syntax to mechanism-AI coupled dynamical systems.

The final chapter adds uncertainty quantification: a Bayesian last-layer NUTS workflow for estimating the time-varying transmission rate $\beta(t)$ in an SIR model.
